name: Orange Freeze Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the gelatin in the boiling orange juice.
2. Add the softened ice cream to the mixture and blend until smooth.
3. Chill the mixture until it has slightly thickened.
4. Stir in the drained mandarin oranges.
5. Fold in the whipped topping.
6. Pour the filling into the baked pie shell.
7. Freeze for about 2 hours, then remove from the freezer 15 minutes before serving.
